settings.title: Settings
settings.addHookDescription: Writes to hooks.json. Command paths are relative to the config directory.
settings.hooksUserDirHint: hooks.json in Spirit user data directory, shared across workspaces
settings.deleteHookConfirm: Delete hook for "{{event}}" ({{command}})? This removes the entry from local hooks.json.
settings.hooksDescription: Command hooks run scripts at Agent lifecycle points with host process privileges.
settings.hooksTimeoutInvalid: Timeout must be a positive number.
settings.lspEnabledDescription: When off, lint diagnostics and automatic error checks after file edits are disabled.
settings.lspInstallConfirmDescription: Run npm install -g {{package}} on this machine. You may need administrator privileges.
settings.webRemoteAccessDescription: Allow browser connections to this machine; localhost only by default.
settings.listenAddressDescription: Enter loopback IP or LAN IPv4.
settings.blurEffectDescription: Mica on Windows, system vibrancy on macOS. Solid background when off.
settings.llmHttpVersionDescription: Protocol for outbound LLM API requests
settings.blurEffectUnsupported: Current host does not support this option.
settings.clickablePointerCursorDescription: Show a hand cursor over buttons, links, and other clickable controls.
settings.noDefaultRoles: This model currently has no default roles that can be set
settings.setImageGenModel: Set as default image generation model
settings.compactionDemoDescription: Simulate context-triggered compaction in the chat area: Compressing animation, Compaction summary streaming, and compressed assistant reply (no model call, not written to session).
settings.generateSkillTooltip: Go to main chat area, prefill /create-skill, and describe requirements in natural language
settings.deleteSkillConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}" ({{location}})? The entire directory (including SKILL.md) will be removed.
settings.generateRuleTooltip: Go to main chat area, prefill /create-rule, and describe requirements in natural language
settings.deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}" ({{location}})? This removes the rule file.
settings.ruleDescPlaceholder: Briefly describe the coding constraints to enforce
settings.name: Name
settings.skillDescPlaceholder: Briefly describe when to use and what it does
settings.deleteExtensionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete extension "{{name}}"? This will remove the local installation directory.
settings.desktopCssDescription: This style will be injected as an extension layer into Desktop Renderer and can override UI appearance with stable `data-spirit-*` hooks.
settings.cliHookDescription: This is a CLI-only controlled semantic hook and will not execute in Desktop Renderer.
settings.deleteMcpConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete MCP server "{{name}}"? This will remove the corresponding configuration from local mcp.json.
settings.addMcpDescription: Form semantics are consistent with CLI: Stdio writes command, HTTP writes URL, metadata is interpreted by transport.
settings.mcpUserDirHint: mcp.json in Spirit user data directory, shared across workspaces
settings.mcpWorkspaceSpiritHint: Workspace .spirit/mcp.json, can be versioned with the repo
settings.mcpMetadataHint: Multiple entries separated by semicolons; HTTP supports `Key: Value` or `Key=Value`, Stdio uses `KEY=value`.
settings.cannotDeleteProviderGroup: Cannot delete provider group containing the current model
settings.activeModelKeepHint: An inference model must be kept at all times; to switch, set it on the target model.
settings.activeModelUsage: Used for chat, planning, and tool orchestration.
settings.imageGenModelUsage: Used for generate_image and other image outputs; after unchecking, no default image model will be specified.
settings.videoGenModelUsage: Used for generate_video and other video outputs; after unchecking, no default video model will be specified.
settings.setVideoGenModel: Set as default video generation model
settings.lightweightChatModelUsage: Used for dream collection, worktree naming, and other lightweight background tasks. When unset, falls back by name rules then the current inference model.
settings.noDefaultRolesForModel: This model currently has no default roles that can be set.
settings.deleteModelConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete model "{{name}}"? Configuration and separately saved key will be removed together.
settings.deleteProviderGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all models under "{{provider}}"? Configuration and key will be removed together.
settings.selectProviderDescription: Select a provider and fill in connection info.
settings.customConnectionDescription: First select API type, then fill in endpoint and key.
settings.providerConnectionDescription: First select API type, then fill in API Key.
settings.volcengineConnectionDescription: Select API type, then enter API Key.
settings.transportVolcengineResponses: Volcengine Ark Responses API (`/api/v3/responses`), including context caching.
settings.providerSimpleDescription: Fill in API Key to connect.
settings.noModelsReturned: No models returned. Please check the key or endpoint.
settings.contextLengthInvalid: Context length must be a positive integer.
settings.noExtensionSettings: This extension has declared an independent settings page, but has not yet declared any settings or secret slots.
settings.dreamDescription: Summarize recent session trends for the current workspace and branch in the background.
settings.collectorModelDescription: Used for background summarization; collection will not start when not selected.
settings.debugModeDescription: Subsequent collection sessions will be kept as traceable records.
settings.fontEnumerationFailed: Unable to enumerate system fonts; please try again in the Desktop client.
settings.newSkillDescription: Create a SKILL.md at the selected save location.

dreams.collectorRunning: Dreams are being collected. New recent trends will appear here soon.

error.logSessionExported: Exported: llm_history, full API request traces (including tools and system), full system text:
error.logSessionNote: messages: API form of in-memory llm_history. api_request_trace: each model inference step is a tool_agent_chat_completions call, stream=true, with tools; multiple tool rounds will have multiple traces (one HTTP per round), failed rounds also keep the last request body. system_prompts are system text exported by transport (e.g. tool_agent), for debugging and export.

tool.question: Question

demo.compactionUserText: Please continue implementing the Desktop connection wizard: automatically compress history when context approaches the limit, and retain the most recent round of tool results.
demo.compactionSummary:
## Context compressed

- User requested implementation of connection wizard and context compression related UI.
- Discussed OpenAI Responses API, transportKind and provider presets.
- Discarded earlier 8 tool outputs and 3 rounds of chat (~42k tokens), retaining current task and recent read_file results.
demo.compactionAssistantReply: Continuing based on the compressed context: I will add a "Context Compression" style demo entry in Settings and check the spacing between the Compaction block and subsequent assistant replies.

slash.createRule: Create or tighten a rule file in natural language (default .spirit/rule.md)
slash.createSkill: Create or tighten a SKILL.md in natural language
slash.logSession: Export current session llm_history and full API request traces and open automatically
slash.startImplementing: Read the active Spirit plan and start implementing
slash.compact: Proactively compress current session context history
slash.fork: Fork the session at the latest assistant message into a new chat
slash.loop: Enable autonomous loop until finish_task or remove the chip with Backspace
slash.plan: Plan without editing code: draft implementation plans and guide you to start implementing when ready
slash.ask: Read-only help: explain, browse, and search the codebase
slash.debug: Systematic bug investigation: rank hypotheses, add log points, iterate root cause from logs
slash.activateSkillPrompt: Please handle the current task according to skill "{{skillName}}".
